name: Contract Explorer
description: Interactive inspector for Decantr contract artifacts such as essence files, execution packs, Project Health reports, schema snippets, and remediation prompts.

inspector.description: Split-pane contract inspector with artifact tabs, tree or section navigation, selected JSON/markdown preview, and copy/open actions.

slots.artifact-tabs: Tabs for Essence, Packs, Health, Schema, or Prompt.
slots.artifact-tree: Optional tree of sections, pages, findings, or schema nodes.
slots.preview: Code or markdown preview of the selected artifact.
slots.action-bar: Copy, open, download, or prompt actions.

visual_brief: A small but powerful developer inspector that makes Decantr contracts feel inspectable and trustworthy. The left side should help users navigate contract structure; the right side should render selected JSON, markdown, health findings, or prompts with clear copy/open actions. It should feel like a local studio or internal developer tool, not a decorative code block.

responsive.mobile: Tabs appear first, tree collapses into a select or disclosure, preview scrolls horizontally inside its own region.
responsive.tablet: Tabs plus stacked tree and preview.
responsive.desktop: Split-pane inspector with fixed navigation width and flexible preview region.

layout_hints.preview_containment: Code/markdown preview must scroll inside its own region and never force page overflow.
layout_hints.artifact_scope: Keep selected artifact context visible through a title, breadcrumb, or badge.
layout_hints.actions: Copy and prompt actions should be icon+label or icon-only with tooltips and aria labels.

motion.micro: Selection changes can cross-fade preview content. Copy actions should show a brief confirmation.
motion.transitions: Avoid animated code reflow; preserve reading position when possible.

keyboard: Tabs and tree items should follow standard keyboard behavior.
Preview region should be focusable when it scrolls.
announcements: Selection changes should announce the selected artifact title.
accessibility.focus_management: Copy/open buttons should remain reachable after the preview title and before long code content.
